summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pre-sales Board iteration 16 features: Branch picker popup, Appointment booking flow (Calendly-style), full-width sticky white header, and JSON preview removal. Fixed 2 bugs: 1) Backend permission issue - pre_sales role was missing from book-appointment endpoint, 2) Frontend slot comparison bug - time slots had seconds but doctor slots didn't.
critical_code_review_comments: All features working correctly after fixes
Branch picker popup shows radio-selectable branches with Assign/Cancel buttons
Booking flow shows date picker -> time slots grid (08:00-20:30 in 30-min intervals) -> doctor list with Available/Unavailable status
Unavailable doctors correctly shown with low opacity (0.4)
Header is full-width, white background, sticky, with FitsiomaxOS brand and blue text
JSON preview card correctly hidden for pre_sales role
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 2067: added pre_sales to book-appointment endpoint roles)
/app/frontend/src/components/PreSalesBoard.jsx (line 558: removed seconds from slot generation, line 811: normalized slot comparison)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Iteration16_Lead and TEST_Branch_Assign_* leads during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-sales Board iteration 16 fully tested on https://bizdev-dashboard.preview.emergentagent.com. Login: presales@fitsiomax.com / presales123 (demo dropdown index 3). Features verified: 1) Branch picker popup - clicking 'Assigned to Branch' stage button opens popup with radio-selectable branches, Assign/Cancel buttons work. 2) Booking flow - clicking 'Appointment Booked' opens Calendly-style flow: date picker -> time slots grid (08:00-20:30 in 30-min intervals) -> doctor list with Available/Unavailable status (unavailable shown with 0.4 opacity). 3) Header - full-width, white background (rgb(255,255,255)), sticky position, FitsiomaxOS brand, blue text, Hi greeting. 4) JSON preview card NOT visible for pre_sales role. Backend APIs tested: POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/move-stage, POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/assign-branch, POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/book-appointment, GET /api/v3/doctors, GET /api/v3/doctors/available. Two bugs were fixed: backend permission (pre_sales added to book-appointment), frontend slot comparison (normalized to 16 chars).

features_tested.login: Pre-sales user login via demo dropdown (index 3) works correctly
features_tested.kanban_view: 3 columns: New Lead, Pre-sales Qualified, Assigned to Branch

backend_apis_tested.POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/move-stage: Works - moves lead stage and creates activity
backend_apis_tested.POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/assign-branch: Works - assigns branch and updates stage to 'Assigned to Branch'
backend_apis_tested.GET /api/v3/doctors: Works - returns doctors list with slots
backend_apis_tested.GET /api/v3/doctors/available: Works - returns available doctors for slot
backend_apis_tested.POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/book-appointment: Works - creates appointment and updates stage to 'Appointment Booked'

bugs_fixed.issue: pre_sales role was missing from v3_book_appointment endpoint allowed roles
Time slots generated with seconds (:00) but doctor slots stored without seconds, causing all doctors to show as unavailable
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed seconds from slot generation and normalized slot comparison to 16 characters

mocked_api_status: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are live
